details: Read program factory and table templates
Read program factory, reader kernel, compute kernel, and header files
Read writer kernel, reader kernel, compute kernel, header, types, cb_utils
Read program_factory, both compute kernels (kernel + sfpu_kernel), reader, writer, cb_utils.hpp
Read untilize_helpers.inl - full compute implementation with block-based and single-pass paths
Queried DeepWiki about tilize sticks/tiles and TensorAccessorArgs. Learned stick=RM row, tile=32x32 block, TensorAccessorArgs template param is CTA offset.
Queried DeepWiki on TensorAccessor, pack_untilize_block, and CB index conventions
Queried: tile_regs protocol, FPU vs SFPU paths, binary_dest_reuse_tiles, _with_dt suffix, rsqrt_tile
Completed reading all source files and documentation. Now synthesizing analysis.
Confirmed output CB layout after untilize: tile_height rows of block_width * TILE_WIDTH elements each, written as sticks to DRAM
Read reduce.h, mul_reduce_scalar.h, add_rsqrt.h APIs. Also read deepseek rmsnorm compute implementation and moreh_common.hpp helpers

All research complete: batch_norm compute kernels, deepseek rmsnorm, normalization kernel_util helpers (numeric.h, policies.h, memory.h), layernorm_compute_utils.h, fill_tile_utils.hpp, reduce.h, mul_reduce_scalar.h, add_rsqrt.h, rmsnorm.h, tilize/untilize APIs. Ready to write analysis.
Wrote untilize_analysis.md with focus on output stage: writer kernel pattern, output CB sizing, stick extraction, TensorAccessor usage
Written batch_norm_analysis.md with compute-core focus: CB layout, multi-pass reuse patterns, FPU vs SFPU variants, all API signatures, relevance to RMSNorm design
Committed untilize_analysis.md in 3cbed774fc and breadcrumbs in b3d712500a
tilize analysis committed as part of 3cbed774fc
